name: Finn Oakshield
title: The Loyal Guardian

physical_description.hair: Auburn hair kept short and practical
physical_description.eyes: Warm brown eyes that reflect kindness
physical_description.clothing: Leather vest over practical shirt, smith's apron

catchphrases: A good blade is forged through fire
I'll stand with you, no matter what

backstory.motivation: Promised Kira's parents he'd keep her safe
backstory.journey: First adventure beyond the village borders
backstory.secrets: His family's smithing techniques are magical

character_arc.start: Simple village smith content with small life
character_arc.growth: Discovers his worth extends beyond his hammer
character_arc.challenges: Must learn when to fight and when to trust others
character_arc.end_goal: Become a master craftsman and guardian

goals: Protect Kira and support her mission
Master his family's magical smithing arts
Prove himself worthy of the trust placed in him
Return home to improve village defenses
